system.flavor: A splash of ceremonial liquor or the wave of a fan calls forth the spirits of the summer fire festivals.
system.effect:
Attack: 1 piercing damage. On hit: +1 piercing damage
Area effect: 1 piercing damage
On hit a festival hob adjacent to your target.

Festival Hob
Summon (3)
Summon effect hob has aura 1. The aura is dangerous terrain.
Summon Action [X]: Increase the aura of each festival hob by +1. This effect stacks (max +3), and lasts until the hob is dismissed. However, on a (1-3) the hob explodes, dismissing it and dealing 2 piercing damage to all characters inside the aura.
